positive: A highly stylized, minimal representation of cosmic nebula and abstract celestial bodies, designed as a seamless, symmetrical emblem. Focus on deep indigo and electric teal color palette, contrasted with glowing gold accents. The composition must feature clean, flowing lines and recognizable constellations arranged in a central, circular motif. Emphasize high contrast silhouettes and geometric overlays that give the appearance of etched glass or polished metal. Art style: Neo-Art Deco combined with celestial geometry, vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Clean edges, vibrant saturation, centralized composition, magical realism, symmetrical design.
